title: abutilon stellatum
intro: Abutilon stellatum, also known as the silver-leaved abutilon or flowering maple, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of abutilon stellatum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Abutilon stellatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
